tasks.label: Restart GUI App
args: $ports=8050,8051,8052; $conns=Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in $ports }; if($conns){$pids=$conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach($p in $pids){try{Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop}catch{}}}; $env:GPE_GUI_PORT='8050'; julia --project=examples/gui examples/gui/pipeline_gui_app.jl
